name: share_item
description: Create a sharing link for a file or folder on OneDrive to allow others to access it. You can specify whether the link grants view or edit permissions, and whether it is accessible to anyone or only to people in the organization.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the file or folder to share.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of sharing link: 'view' for read-only, 'edit' for read-write, 'embed' for embeddable.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope of the link: 'anonymous' for anyone with the link, 'organization' for people within the same organization.

parameters.name: expirationDateTime
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date/time when the sharing link expires.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: A password that the user must enter to access the shared item via the link.
